name: Solara
archetype: Level 12 Paladin, zealous sun-worshipping warrior priest
speech_patterns: Uses sun and light metaphors constantly in every conversation
Speaks in declarative statements about the sun's will and glory
Often breaks into spontaneous prayers or blessings mid-sentence
quirks: Always faces east when speaking seriously
Refuses to enter buildings without windows
Closes eyes and raises face to any light source
example_phrases: The sun's glory shines through you, friend! May its warmth guide your blade!
Darkness cannot stand before the dawn. Never has, never will.
I saw three omens in today's sunrise. All favorable!
Even clouds are just the sun's way of teaching us to appreciate its return.
By the sacred flame, these undead will BURN!
